title: nessentials [DISCONTINUED]
description: A small But Essential plugin that is useful for mc servers.
body: # DISCONTINUED PLEASE DONT USE THIS PLUGIN! RELEASING A BETTER PLUGIN! # Nessentials A small But Essential plugin that is useful for mc servers. Download at SpigotMc, Modrinth, or Bukkit ## Goals: 100 - ✅ 200 - ❌ 500 - ❌ 1000 - ❌ ## Commands: /fly /vanish | /v /maintenance | /maintenance on | /maintenance off | /maintenance help /adminchat | /ac /staffchat | /sc /adminbroadcast | /abroadcast /broadcast /mainmenu | /mm | /menu /head /setmotd | /motdset /godmode /heal /nessentials | /ness | /ninessentials /gms /gmsp /gmc /gma /suicide /discord /sethome /home /setwarp /warp /tpa /tpahere /tpaccept /tpdeny /deletehome /deletewarp /playerinfo | /info ## bStats ## IMAGES SOON!!!
